subcodes.first_line: This is the Tablet which God, the Merciful, hath revealed for the one who has turned toward Him and the one who has attained
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن لمن اقبل الیه و فاز بایام الله مالک یوم الحساب انه فاز
subcodes.subjects: @goodly deeds; actions, @call to action, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness
